revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.
1 revision imported: importing automatically generrated pages

revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} {{#ifeq:{{SUBPAGENAME}}|sandbox||{{High-use}}}} {{lua|Module:Sort}} ;Usage:{{sortname|''first''|''last''|''optional link target''|''optional sort key''}} Alternative version of {{tl|sort}} tailored to the wikilinked names of persons, to be used in a sortable table (created with ''class="wikitable sortable"''). *The default sort key is "''last'', ''first''". *The link label is "''first'' ''last''". *The default link target is "''first last''" The optional link target is useful when "''first last''" is a disambiguation page instead of the desired article, or when linking to a section of a page. The optional sort key is useful in the case of special characters such as é. ;Optional parameters : |dab=''disambiguator'' :: Wikilinks to "''first last (disambiguator)''".
(Note: ignored if ''optional link target'' is not blank.) : |nolink=1 ::Suppresses wikilinking the name, useful for list entries which are likely to never have articles so shouldn't be redlinked.
(Note: ''optional link target'' ignored when "|nolink=1" used.) ==Examples== {| class=wikitable ! # || What you type || What's generated |- | 1 || {{sortname|first|last}} | [[first last|first last]] |- | 2 || {{sortname|first|last|nolink=1}} | first last |- | 3 || {{sortname|first|last|dab=disambiguator}} | [[first last (disambiguator)|first last]] |- | 4 || {{sortname|first|last|target}} | [[target|first last]] |- | 5 || {{sortname|first|last||sort}} | [[first last|first last]] |- | 6 || {{sortname|first|last||sort|nolink=1}} | first last |- | 7 || {{sortname|first|last|target|sort}} | [[target|first last]] |} {| class=wikitable ! # || What you type || What's displayed || What's sorted || What's linked |- | 1 || {{sortname|Tom|Jones}} | {{sortname|Tom|Jones}} | Jones, Tom | [[Tom Jones]] |- | 2 || {{sortname|Tom|Jones|nolink=1}} | {{sortname|Tom|Jones|nolink=1}} | Jones, Tom | ''(no link)'' |- | 3 || {{sortname|Tom|Jones|dab=singer}} | {{sortname|Tom|Jones|dab=singer}} | Jones, Tom | [[Tom Jones (singer)]] |- | 4 || {{sortname|Tom|Jones|Tom Jones (singer)}} | {{sortname|Tom|Jones|Tom Jones (singer)}} | Jones, Tom | [[Tom Jones (singer)]] |- | |- | 1 || {{sortname|Fábio|da Silva}} | {{sortname|Fábio|da Silva}} | da Silva, Fábio | [[Fábio da Silva]] |- | 2 || {{sortname|Fábio|da Silva|nolink=1}} | {{sortname|Fábio|da Silva|nolink=1}} | da Silva, Fábio | ''(no link)'' |- | 3 || {{sortname|Fábio|da Silva|Fábio Gomes da Silva}} | {{sortname|Fábio|da Silva|Fábio Gomes da Silva}} | da Silva, Fábio | [[Fábio Gomes da Silva]] |- | 4 || {{sortname|Fábio|da Silva||Silva, Fabio}} | {{sortname|Fábio|da Silva||Silva, Fabio}} | Silva, Fabio | [[Fábio da Silva]] |- | 5 || {{sortname|Fábio|da Silva||Silva, Fabio|nolink=1}} | {{sortname|Fábio|da Silva||Silva, Fabio|nolink=1}} | Silva, Fabio | ''(no link)'' |- | 6 || {{sortname|Fábio|da Silva|Fábio Gomes da Silva|Silva, Fabio}} | {{sortname|Fábio|da Silva|Fábio Gomes da Silva|Silva, Fabio}} | Silva, Fabio | [[Fábio Gomes da Silva]] |} '''Things you might not expect''' {| class=wikitable ! # || What you type || What's displayed || What's sorted || What's linked |- | - || [[Mark Evans]] | [[Mark Evans]] | Mark Evans | [[Mark Evans]] |- | - || [[Mark Evans (general)|Mark Evans]] | [[Mark Evans (general)|Mark Evans]] | Mark Evans (general) | [[Mark Evans (general)]] |- | |- | 1 || Sir {{sortname|Mark|Evans}} | Sir {{sortname|Mark|Evans}} | Sir Evans, Mark | [[Mark Evans]] |- | 1 || {{sortname|Sir Mark|Evans}} | {{sortname|Sir Mark|Evans}} | Evans, Sir Mark | [[Sir Mark Evans]] |- | 3 || {{sortname|Sir Mark|Evans|Mark Evans (general)}} | {{sortname|Sir Mark|Evans|Mark Evans (general)}} | Evans, Sir Mark | [[Mark Evans (general)]] |- | 6 || {{sortname|Sir Mark|Evans|Mark Evans (general)|Evans, Mark}} | {{sortname|Sir Mark|Evans|Mark Evans (general)|Evans, Mark}} | Evans, Mark | [[Mark Evans (general)]] |- | |- | 1 || {{sortname|Fábio da|Silva}} | {{sortname|Fábio da|Silva}} | Silva, Fábio da | [[Fábio da Silva]] |- | 2 || {{sortname|Fábio da|Silva|nolink=1}} | {{sortname|Fábio da|Silva|nolink=1}} | Silva, Fábio da | ''(no link)'' |- | 3 || {{sortname|Fábio da|Silva|Fábio Gomes da Silva}} | {{sortname|Fábio da|Silva|Fábio Gomes da Silva}} | Silva, Fábio da | [[Fábio Gomes da Silva]] |- | 4 || {{sortname|Fábio da|Silva||Silva, Fabio}} | {{sortname|Fábio da|Silva||Silva, Fabio}} | Silva, Fabio | [[Fábio da Silva]] |- | 5 || {{sortname|Fábio da|Silva||Silva, Fabio|nolink=1}} | {{sortname|Fábio da|Silva||Silva, has Fabio|nolink=1}} | Silva, Fabio | ''(no link)'' |- | 6 || {{sortname|Fábio da|Silva|Fábio Gomes da Silva|Silva, Fabio}} | {{sortname|Fábio da|Silva|Fábio Gomes da Silva|Silva, Fabio}} | Silva, Fabio | [[Fábio Gomes da Silva]] |} ==Note== To link to a section within the page in which the template appears, encode the [[number sign]]: 
{{Sortname|Examples||#Examples}}
:gives: {{Sortname|Examples||#Examples}} and for an [[Help:Interlanguage links#Inline links|inline Interlanguage link]] the initial colon must be encoded as %3A 
{{Sortname|Hanning|Schröder|%3Ade:Hanning Schröder}}
:gives: {{Sortname|Hanning|Schröder|%3Ade:Hanning Schröder}} ==Microformat== {{UF-hcard-name}} ==See also== *[[Help:Sortable tables#Specifying a sort key for a cell]] *{{tl|sort}} – see talk for central sorting talk *{{tl|Date table sorting}}  – for using dates in sortable tables *{{tl|Number table sorting}}  – for using alphabetic sort mode for numbers in sortable tables *{{tl|Last word}} {{sandbox other|| [[Category:Sorting templates|Sortname]] }} { "params": { "1": { "label": "First Name", "example": "Tom", "required": true, "suggested": true }, "2": { "label": "Last Name", "example": "Jones", "required": true }, "3": { "label": "Optional Link Target", "example": "Tom Jones (singer)", "type": "wiki-page-name" }, "4": { "label": "Optional Sort Key", "example": "Jones, Tom" }, "sort": {}, "last": {}, "first": {}, "nolink": { "label": "No Link", "description": "Type \"1\" for no wikilink to appear ", "example": "1" }, "dab": { "label": "Disambiguator (no brackets)", "example": "singer" }, "link": {} }, "paramOrder": [ "1", "2", "3", "4", "dab", "nolink", "sort", "last", "first", "link" ], "format": "inline" }

revision.comment: Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} {{#ifeq:{{SUBPAGENAME}}|sandbox||{{High-use}}}} {{lua|Module:Sort}} ;Usage:{{sortname|''first''|''last''|''optional link target''|''optional sort key''}} Alternative version of {{tl|sort}} tailored to the wikilinked names of persons, to be used in a sortable table (created with ''class="wikitable sortable"''). *The default sort key is "''last'', ''first''". *The link label is "''first'' ''last''". *The default link target is "''first last''" The optional link target is useful when "''first last''" is a disambiguation page instead of the desired article, or when linking to a section of a page. The optional sort key is useful in the case of special characters such as é. ;Optional parameters : |dab=''disambiguator'' :: Wikilinks to "''first last (disambiguator)''".
(Note: ignored if ''optional link target'' is not blank.) : |nolink=1 ::Suppresses wikilinking the name, useful for list entries which are likely to never have articles so shouldn't be redlinked.
(Note: ''optional link target'' ignored when "|nolink=1" used.) ==Examples== {| class=wikitable ! # || What you type || What's generated |- | 1 || {{sortname|first|last}} | [[first last|first last]] |- | 2 || {{sortname|first|last|nolink=1}} | first last |- | 3 || {{sortname|first|last|dab=disambiguator}} | [[first last (disambiguator)|first last]] |- | 4 || {{sortname|first|last|target}} | [[target|first last]] |- | 5 || {{sortname|first|last||sort}} | [[first last|first last]] |- | 6 || {{sortname|first|last||sort|nolink=1}} | first last |- | 7 || {{sortname|first|last|target|sort}} | [[target|first last]] |} {| class=wikitable ! # || What you type || What's displayed || What's sorted || What's linked |- | 1 || {{sortname|Tom|Jones}} | {{sortname|Tom|Jones}} | Jones, Tom | [[Tom Jones]] |- | 2 || {{sortname|Tom|Jones|nolink=1}} | {{sortname|Tom|Jones|nolink=1}} | Jones, Tom | ''(no link)'' |- | 3 || {{sortname|Tom|Jones|dab=singer}} | {{sortname|Tom|Jones|dab=singer}} | Jones, Tom | [[Tom Jones (singer)]] |- | 4 || {{sortname|Tom|Jones|Tom Jones (singer)}} | {{sortname|Tom|Jones|Tom Jones (singer)}} | Jones, Tom | [[Tom Jones (singer)]] |- | |- | 1 || {{sortname|Fábio|da Silva}} | {{sortname|Fábio|da Silva}} | da Silva, Fábio | [[Fábio da Silva]] |- | 2 || {{sortname|Fábio|da Silva|nolink=1}} | {{sortname|Fábio|da Silva|nolink=1}} | da Silva, Fábio | ''(no link)'' |- | 3 || {{sortname|Fábio|da Silva|Fábio Gomes da Silva}} | {{sortname|Fábio|da Silva|Fábio Gomes da Silva}} | da Silva, Fábio | [[Fábio Gomes da Silva]] |- | 4 || {{sortname|Fábio|da Silva||Silva, Fabio}} | {{sortname|Fábio|da Silva||Silva, Fabio}} | Silva, Fabio | [[Fábio da Silva]] |- | 5 || {{sortname|Fábio|da Silva||Silva, Fabio|nolink=1}} | {{sortname|Fábio|da Silva||Silva, Fabio|nolink=1}} | Silva, Fabio | ''(no link)'' |- | 6 || {{sortname|Fábio|da Silva|Fábio Gomes da Silva|Silva, Fabio}} | {{sortname|Fábio|da Silva|Fábio Gomes da Silva|Silva, Fabio}} | Silva, Fabio | [[Fábio Gomes da Silva]] |} '''Things you might not expect''' {| class=wikitable ! # || What you type || What's displayed || What's sorted || What's linked |- | - || [[Mark Evans]] | [[Mark Evans]] | Mark Evans | [[Mark Evans]] |- | - || [[Mark Evans (general)|Mark Evans]] | [[Mark Evans (general)|Mark Evans]] | Mark Evans (general) | [[Mark Evans (general)]] |- | |- | 1 || Sir {{sortname|Mark|Evans}} | Sir {{sortname|Mark|Evans}} | Sir Evans, Mark | [[Mark Evans]] |- | 1 || {{sortname|Sir Mark|Evans}} | {{sortname|Sir Mark|Evans}} | Evans, Sir Mark | [[Sir Mark Evans]] |- | 3 || {{sortname|Sir Mark|Evans|Mark Evans (general)}} | {{sortname|Sir Mark|Evans|Mark Evans (general)}} | Evans, Sir Mark | [[Mark Evans (general)]] |- | 6 || {{sortname|Sir Mark|Evans|Mark Evans (general)|Evans, Mark}} | {{sortname|Sir Mark|Evans|Mark Evans (general)|Evans, Mark}} | Evans, Mark | [[Mark Evans (general)]] |- | |- | 1 || {{sortname|Fábio da|Silva}} | {{sortname|Fábio da|Silva}} | Silva, Fábio da | [[Fábio da Silva]] |- | 2 || {{sortname|Fábio da|Silva|nolink=1}} | {{sortname|Fábio da|Silva|nolink=1}} | Silva, Fábio da | ''(no link)'' |- | 3 || {{sortname|Fábio da|Silva|Fábio Gomes da Silva}} | {{sortname|Fábio da|Silva|Fábio Gomes da Silva}} | Silva, Fábio da | [[Fábio Gomes da Silva]] |- | 4 || {{sortname|Fábio da|Silva||Silva, Fabio}} | {{sortname|Fábio da|Silva||Silva, Fabio}} | Silva, Fabio | [[Fábio da Silva]] |- | 5 || {{sortname|Fábio da|Silva||Silva, Fabio|nolink=1}} | {{sortname|Fábio da|Silva||Silva, has Fabio|nolink=1}} | Silva, Fabio | ''(no link)'' |- | 6 || {{sortname|Fábio da|Silva|Fábio Gomes da Silva|Silva, Fabio}} | {{sortname|Fábio da|Silva|Fábio Gomes da Silva|Silva, Fabio}} | Silva, Fabio | [[Fábio Gomes da Silva]] |} ==Note== To link to a section within the page in which the template appears, encode the [[:en:Number sign|Number sign]]: 
{{Sortname|Examples||#Examples}}
:gives: {{Sortname|Examples||#Examples}} and for an [[Help:Interlanguage links#Inline links|inline Interlanguage link]] the initial colon must be encoded as %3A 
{{Sortname|Hanning|Schröder|%3Ade:Hanning Schröder}}
:gives: {{Sortname|Hanning|Schröder|%3Ade:Hanning Schröder}} ==Microformat== {{UF-hcard-name}} ==See also== *[[Help:Sortable tables#Specifying a sort key for a cell]] *{{tl|sort}} – see talk for central sorting talk *{{tl|Date table sorting}}  – for using dates in sortable tables *{{tl|Number table sorting}}  – for using alphabetic sort mode for numbers in sortable tables *{{tl|Last word}} {{sandbox other|| [[Category:Sorting templates|Sortname]] }} { "params": { "1": { "label": "First Name", "example": "Tom", "required": true, "suggested": true }, "2": { "label": "Last Name", "example": "Jones", "required": true }, "3": { "label": "Optional Link Target", "example": "Tom Jones (singer)", "type": "wiki-page-name" }, "4": { "label": "Optional Sort Key", "example": "Jones, Tom" }, "sort": {}, "last": {}, "first": {}, "nolink": { "label": "No Link", "description": "Type \"1\" for no wikilink to appear ", "example": "1" }, "dab": { "label": "Disambiguator (no brackets)", "example": "singer" }, "link": {} }, "paramOrder": [ "1", "2", "3", "4", "dab", "nolink", "sort", "last", "first", "link" ], "format": "inline" }

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} {{#ifeq:{{SUBPAGENAME}}|sandbox||{{High-use}}}} {{lua|Module:Sort}} ;Usage:{{sortname|''first''|''last''|''optional link target''|''optional sort key''}} Alternative version of {{tl|sort}} tailored to the wikilinked names of persons, to be used in a sortable table (created with ''class="wikitable sortable"''). *The default sort key is "''last'', ''first''". *The link label is "''first'' ''last''". *The default link target is "''first last''" The optional link target is useful when "''first last''" is a disambiguation page instead of the desired article, or when linking to a section of a page. The optional sort key is useful in the case of special characters such as é. ;Optional parameters : |dab=''disambiguator'' :: Wikilinks to "''first last (disambiguator)''".
(Note: ignored if ''optional link target'' is not blank.) : |nolink=1 ::Suppresses wikilinking the name, useful for list entries which are likely to never have articles so shouldn't be redlinked.
(Note: ''optional link target'' ignored when "|nolink=1" used.) ==Examples== {| class=wikitable ! # || What you type || What's generated |- | 1 || {{sortname|first|last}} | [[first last|first last]] |- | 2 || {{sortname|first|last|nolink=1}} | first last |- | 3 || {{sortname|first|last|dab=disambiguator}} | [[first last (disambiguator)|first last]] |- | 4 || {{sortname|first|last|target}} | [[target|first last]] |- | 5 || {{sortname|first|last||sort}} | [[first last|first last]] |- | 6 || {{sortname|first|last||sort|nolink=1}} | first last |- | 7 || {{sortname|first|last|target|sort}} | [[target|first last]] |} {| class=wikitable ! # || What you type || What's displayed || What's sorted || What's linked |- | 1 || {{sortname|Tom|Jones}} | {{sortname|Tom|Jones}} | Jones, Tom | [[Tom Jones]] |- | 2 || {{sortname|Tom|Jones|nolink=1}} | {{sortname|Tom|Jones|nolink=1}} | Jones, Tom | ''(no link)'' |- | 3 || {{sortname|Tom|Jones|dab=singer}} | {{sortname|Tom|Jones|dab=singer}} | Jones, Tom | [[Tom Jones (singer)]] |- | 4 || {{sortname|Tom|Jones|Tom Jones (singer)}} | {{sortname|Tom|Jones|Tom Jones (singer)}} | Jones, Tom | [[Tom Jones (singer)]] |- | |- | 1 || {{sortname|Fábio|da Silva}} | {{sortname|Fábio|da Silva}} | da Silva, Fábio | [[Fábio da Silva]] |- | 2 || {{sortname|Fábio|da Silva|nolink=1}} | {{sortname|Fábio|da Silva|nolink=1}} | da Silva, Fábio | ''(no link)'' |- | 3 || {{sortname|Fábio|da Silva|Fábio Gomes da Silva}} | {{sortname|Fábio|da Silva|Fábio Gomes da Silva}} | da Silva, Fábio | [[Fábio Gomes da Silva]] |- | 4 || {{sortname|Fábio|da Silva||Silva, Fabio}} | {{sortname|Fábio|da Silva||Silva, Fabio}} | Silva, Fabio | [[Fábio da Silva]] |- | 5 || {{sortname|Fábio|da Silva||Silva, Fabio|nolink=1}} | {{sortname|Fábio|da Silva||Silva, Fabio|nolink=1}} | Silva, Fabio | ''(no link)'' |- | 6 || {{sortname|Fábio|da Silva|Fábio Gomes da Silva|Silva, Fabio}} | {{sortname|Fábio|da Silva|Fábio Gomes da Silva|Silva, Fabio}} | Silva, Fabio | [[Fábio Gomes da Silva]] |} '''Things you might not expect''' {| class=wikitable ! # || What you type || What's displayed || What's sorted || What's linked |- | - || [[Mark Evans]] | [[Mark Evans]] | Mark Evans | [[Mark Evans]] |- | - || [[Mark Evans (general)|Mark Evans]] | [[Mark Evans (general)|Mark Evans]] | Mark Evans (general) | [[Mark Evans (general)]] |- | |- | 1 || Sir {{sortname|Mark|Evans}} | Sir {{sortname|Mark|Evans}} | Sir Evans, Mark | [[Mark Evans]] |- | 1 || {{sortname|Sir Mark|Evans}} | {{sortname|Sir Mark|Evans}} | Evans, Sir Mark | [[Sir Mark Evans]] |- | 3 || {{sortname|Sir Mark|Evans|Mark Evans (general)}} | {{sortname|Sir Mark|Evans|Mark Evans (general)}} | Evans, Sir Mark | [[Mark Evans (general)]] |- | 6 || {{sortname|Sir Mark|Evans|Mark Evans (general)|Evans, Mark}} | {{sortname|Sir Mark|Evans|Mark Evans (general)|Evans, Mark}} | Evans, Mark | [[Mark Evans (general)]] |- | |- | 1 || {{sortname|Fábio da|Silva}} | {{sortname|Fábio da|Silva}} | Silva, Fábio da | [[Fábio da Silva]] |- | 2 || {{sortname|Fábio da|Silva|nolink=1}} | {{sortname|Fábio da|Silva|nolink=1}} | Silva, Fábio da | ''(no link)'' |- | 3 || {{sortname|Fábio da|Silva|Fábio Gomes da Silva}} | {{sortname|Fábio da|Silva|Fábio Gomes da Silva}} | Silva, Fábio da | [[Fábio Gomes da Silva]] |- | 4 || {{sortname|Fábio da|Silva||Silva, Fabio}} | {{sortname|Fábio da|Silva||Silva, Fabio}} | Silva, Fabio | [[Fábio da Silva]] |- | 5 || {{sortname|Fábio da|Silva||Silva, Fabio|nolink=1}} | {{sortname|Fábio da|Silva||Silva, has Fabio|nolink=1}} | Silva, Fabio | ''(no link)'' |- | 6 || {{sortname|Fábio da|Silva|Fábio Gomes da Silva|Silva, Fabio}} | {{sortname|Fábio da|Silva|Fábio Gomes da Silva|Silva, Fabio}} | Silva, Fabio | [[Fábio Gomes da Silva]] |} ==Note== To link to a section within the page in which the template appears, encode the [[:en:Number sign|Number sign]]: 
{{Sortname|Examples||#Examples}}
:gives: {{Sortname|Examples||#Examples}} and for an [[Help:Interlanguage links#Inline links|inline Interlanguage link]] the initial colon must be encoded as %3A 
{{Sortname|Hanning|Schröder|%3Ade:Hanning Schröder}}
:gives: {{Sortname|Hanning|Schröder|%3Ade:Hanning Schröder}} ==Microformat== {{UF-hcard-name}} ==See also== *[[Help:Sortable tables#Specifying a sort key for a cell]] *{{tl|sort}} – see talk for central sorting talk *{{tl|Date table sorting}}  – for using dates in sortable tables *{{tl|Number table sorting}}  – for using alphabetic sort mode for numbers in sortable tables *{{tl|Last word}} {{sandbox other|| [[Category:Sorting templates|Sortname]] }} { "params": { "1": { "label": "First Name", "example": "Tom", "required": true, "suggested": true }, "2": { "label": "Last Name", "example": "Jones", "required": true }, "3": { "label": "Optional Link Target", "example": "Tom Jones (singer)", "type": "wiki-page-name" }, "4": { "label": "Optional Sort Key", "example": "Jones, Tom" }, "sort": {}, "last": {}, "first": {}, "nolink": { "label": "No Link", "description": "Type \"1\" for no wikilink to appear ", "example": "1" }, "dab": { "label": "Disambiguator (no brackets)", "example": "singer" }, "link": {} }, "paramOrder": [ "1", "2", "3", "4", "dab", "nolink", "sort", "last", "first", "link" ], "format": "inline" } [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} {{#ifeq:{{SUBPAGENAME}}|sandbox||{{High-use}}}} {{lua|Module:Sort}} ;Usage:{{sortname|''first''|''last''|''optional link target''|''optional sort key''}} Alternative version of {{tl|sort}} tailored to the wikilinked names of persons, to be used in a sortable table (created with ''class="wikitable sortable"''). *The default sort key is "''last'', ''first''". *The link label is "''first'' ''last''". *The default link target is "''first last''" The optional link target is useful when "''first last''" is a disambiguation page instead of the desired article, or when linking to a section of a page. The optional sort key is useful in the case of special characters such as é. ;Optional parameters : |dab=''disambiguator'' :: Wikilinks to "''first last (disambiguator)''".
(Note: ignored if ''optional link target'' is not blank.) : |nolink=1 ::Suppresses wikilinking the name, useful for list entries which are likely to never have articles so shouldn't be redlinked.
(Note: ''optional link target'' ignored when "|nolink=1" used.) ==Examples== {| class=wikitable ! # || What you type || What's generated |- | 1 || {{sortname|first|last}} | [[first last|first last]] |- | 2 || {{sortname|first|last|nolink=1}} | first last |- | 3 || {{sortname|first|last|dab=disambiguator}} | [[first last (disambiguator)|first last]] |- | 4 || {{sortname|first|last|target}} | [[target|first last]] |- | 5 || {{sortname|first|last||sort}} | [[first last|first last]] |- | 6 || {{sortname|first|last||sort|nolink=1}} | first last |- | 7 || {{sortname|first|last|target|sort}} | [[target|first last]] |} {| class=wikitable ! # || What you type || What's displayed || What's sorted || What's linked |- | 1 || {{sortname|Tom|Jones}} | {{sortname|Tom|Jones}} | Jones, Tom | [[Tom Jones]] |- | 2 || {{sortname|Tom|Jones|nolink=1}} | {{sortname|Tom|Jones|nolink=1}} | Jones, Tom | ''(no link)'' |- | 3 || {{sortname|Tom|Jones|dab=singer}} | {{sortname|Tom|Jones|dab=singer}} | Jones, Tom | [[Tom Jones (singer)]] |- | 4 || {{sortname|Tom|Jones|Tom Jones (singer)}} | {{sortname|Tom|Jones|Tom Jones (singer)}} | Jones, Tom | [[Tom Jones (singer)]] |- | |- | 1 || {{sortname|Fábio|da Silva}} | {{sortname|Fábio|da Silva}} | da Silva, Fábio | [[Fábio da Silva]] |- | 2 || {{sortname|Fábio|da Silva|nolink=1}} | {{sortname|Fábio|da Silva|nolink=1}} | da Silva, Fábio | ''(no link)'' |- | 3 || {{sortname|Fábio|da Silva|Fábio Gomes da Silva}} | {{sortname|Fábio|da Silva|Fábio Gomes da Silva}} | da Silva, Fábio | [[Fábio Gomes da Silva]] |- | 4 || {{sortname|Fábio|da Silva||Silva, Fabio}} | {{sortname|Fábio|da Silva||Silva, Fabio}} | Silva, Fabio | [[Fábio da Silva]] |- | 5 || {{sortname|Fábio|da Silva||Silva, Fabio|nolink=1}} | {{sortname|Fábio|da Silva||Silva, Fabio|nolink=1}} | Silva, Fabio | ''(no link)'' |- | 6 || {{sortname|Fábio|da Silva|Fábio Gomes da Silva|Silva, Fabio}} | {{sortname|Fábio|da Silva|Fábio Gomes da Silva|Silva, Fabio}} | Silva, Fabio | [[Fábio Gomes da Silva]] |} '''Things you might not expect''' {| class=wikitable ! # || What you type || What's displayed || What's sorted || What's linked |- | - || [[Mark Evans]] | [[Mark Evans]] | Mark Evans | [[Mark Evans]] |- | - || [[Mark Evans (general)|Mark Evans]] | [[Mark Evans (general)|Mark Evans]] | Mark Evans (general) | [[Mark Evans (general)]] |- | |- | 1 || Sir {{sortname|Mark|Evans}} | Sir {{sortname|Mark|Evans}} | Sir Evans, Mark | [[Mark Evans]] |- | 1 || {{sortname|Sir Mark|Evans}} | {{sortname|Sir Mark|Evans}} | Evans, Sir Mark | [[Sir Mark Evans]] |- | 3 || {{sortname|Sir Mark|Evans|Mark Evans (general)}} | {{sortname|Sir Mark|Evans|Mark Evans (general)}} | Evans, Sir Mark | [[Mark Evans (general)]] |- | 6 || {{sortname|Sir Mark|Evans|Mark Evans (general)|Evans, Mark}} | {{sortname|Sir Mark|Evans|Mark Evans (general)|Evans, Mark}} | Evans, Mark | [[Mark Evans (general)]] |- | |- | 1 || {{sortname|Fábio da|Silva}} | {{sortname|Fábio da|Silva}} | Silva, Fábio da | [[Fábio da Silva]] |- | 2 || {{sortname|Fábio da|Silva|nolink=1}} | {{sortname|Fábio da|Silva|nolink=1}} | Silva, Fábio da | ''(no link)'' |- | 3 || {{sortname|Fábio da|Silva|Fábio Gomes da Silva}} | {{sortname|Fábio da|Silva|Fábio Gomes da Silva}} | Silva, Fábio da | [[Fábio Gomes da Silva]] |- | 4 || {{sortname|Fábio da|Silva||Silva, Fabio}} | {{sortname|Fábio da|Silva||Silva, Fabio}} | Silva, Fabio | [[Fábio da Silva]] |- | 5 || {{sortname|Fábio da|Silva||Silva, Fabio|nolink=1}} | {{sortname|Fábio da|Silva||Silva, has Fabio|nolink=1}} | Silva, Fabio | ''(no link)'' |- | 6 || {{sortname|Fábio da|Silva|Fábio Gomes da Silva|Silva, Fabio}} | {{sortname|Fábio da|Silva|Fábio Gomes da Silva|Silva, Fabio}} | Silva, Fabio | [[Fábio Gomes da Silva]] |} ==Note== To link to a section within the page in which the template appears, encode the [[:en:Number sign|Number sign]]: 
{{Sortname|Examples||#Examples}}
:gives: {{Sortname|Examples||#Examples}} and for an [[Help:Interlanguage links#Inline links|inline Interlanguage link]] the initial colon must be encoded as %3A 
{{Sortname|Hanning|Schröder|%3Ade:Hanning Schröder}}
:gives: {{Sortname|Hanning|Schröder|%3Ade:Hanning Schröder}} ==Microformat== {{UF-hcard-name}} ==See also== *[[Help:Sortable tables#Specifying a sort key for a cell]] *{{tl|sort}} – see talk for central sorting talk *{{tl|Date table sorting}}  – for using dates in sortable tables *{{tl|Number table sorting}}  – for using alphabetic sort mode for numbers in sortable tables *{{tl|Last word}} {{sandbox other|| [[Category:Sorting templates|Sortname]] }} { "params": { "1": { "label": "First Name", "example": "Tom", "required": true, "suggested": true }, "2": { "label": "Last Name", "example": "Jones", "required": true }, "3": { "label": "Optional Link Target", "example": "Tom Jones (singer)", "type": "wiki-page-name" }, "4": { "label": "Optional Sort Key", "example": "Jones, Tom" }, "sort": {}, "last": {}, "first": {}, "nolink": { "label": "No Link", "description": "Type \"1\" for no wikilink to appear ", "example": "1" }, "dab": { "label": "Disambiguator (no brackets)", "example": "singer" }, "link": {} }, "paramOrder": [ "1", "2", "3", "4", "dab", "nolink", "sort", "last", "first", "link" ], "format": "inline" }

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} {{#ifeq:{{SUBPAGENAME}}|sandbox||{{High-use}}}} {{lua|Module:Sort}} ;Usage:{{sortname|''first''|''last''|''optional link target''|''optional sort key''}} Alternative version of {{tl|sort}} tailored to the wikilinked names of persons, to be used in a sortable table (created with ''class="wikitable sortable"''). *The default sort key is "''last'', ''first''". *The link label is "''first'' ''last''". *The default link target is "''first last''" The optional link target is useful when "''first last''" is a disambiguation page instead of the desired article, or when linking to a section of a page. The optional sort key is useful in the case of special characters such as é. ;Optional parameters : |dab=''disambiguator'' :: Wikilinks to "''first last (disambiguator)''".
(Note: ignored if ''optional link target'' is not blank.) : |nolink=1 ::Suppresses wikilinking the name, useful for list entries which are likely to never have articles so shouldn't be redlinked.
(Note: ''optional link target'' ignored when "|nolink=1" used.) ==Examples== {| class=wikitable ! # || What you type || What's generated |- | 1 || {{sortname|first|last}} | [[first last|first last]] |- | 2 || {{sortname|first|last|nolink=1}} | first last |- | 3 || {{sortname|first|last|dab=disambiguator}} | [[first last (disambiguator)|first last]] |- | 4 || {{sortname|first|last|target}} | [[target|first last]] |- | 5 || {{sortname|first|last||sort}} | [[first last|first last]] |- | 6 || {{sortname|first|last||sort|nolink=1}} | first last |- | 7 || {{sortname|first|last|target|sort}} | [[target|first last]] |} {| class=wikitable ! # || What you type || What's displayed || What's sorted || What's linked |- | 1 || {{sortname|Tom|Jones}} | {{sortname|Tom|Jones}} | Jones, Tom | [[Tom Jones]] |- | 2 || {{sortname|Tom|Jones|nolink=1}} | {{sortname|Tom|Jones|nolink=1}} | Jones, Tom | ''(no link)'' |- | 3 || {{sortname|Tom|Jones|dab=singer}} | {{sortname|Tom|Jones|dab=singer}} | Jones, Tom | [[Tom Jones (singer)]] |- | 4 || {{sortname|Tom|Jones|Tom Jones (singer)}} | {{sortname|Tom|Jones|Tom Jones (singer)}} | Jones, Tom | [[Tom Jones (singer)]] |- | |- | 1 || {{sortname|Fábio|da Silva}} | {{sortname|Fábio|da Silva}} | da Silva, Fábio | [[Fábio da Silva]] |- | 2 || {{sortname|Fábio|da Silva|nolink=1}} | {{sortname|Fábio|da Silva|nolink=1}} | da Silva, Fábio | ''(no link)'' |- | 3 || {{sortname|Fábio|da Silva|Fábio Gomes da Silva}} | {{sortname|Fábio|da Silva|Fábio Gomes da Silva}} | da Silva, Fábio | [[Fábio Gomes da Silva]] |- | 4 || {{sortname|Fábio|da Silva||Silva, Fabio}} | {{sortname|Fábio|da Silva||Silva, Fabio}} | Silva, Fabio | [[Fábio da Silva]] |- | 5 || {{sortname|Fábio|da Silva||Silva, Fabio|nolink=1}} | {{sortname|Fábio|da Silva||Silva, Fabio|nolink=1}} | Silva, Fabio | ''(no link)'' |- | 6 || {{sortname|Fábio|da Silva|Fábio Gomes da Silva|Silva, Fabio}} | {{sortname|Fábio|da Silva|Fábio Gomes da Silva|Silva, Fabio}} | Silva, Fabio | [[Fábio Gomes da Silva]] |} '''Things you might not expect''' {| class=wikitable ! # || What you type || What's displayed || What's sorted || What's linked |- | - || [[Mark Evans]] | [[Mark Evans]] | Mark Evans | [[Mark Evans]] |- | - || [[Mark Evans (general)|Mark Evans]] | [[Mark Evans (general)|Mark Evans]] | Mark Evans (general) | [[Mark Evans (general)]] |- | |- | 1 || Sir {{sortname|Mark|Evans}} | Sir {{sortname|Mark|Evans}} | Sir Evans, Mark | [[Mark Evans]] |- | 1 || {{sortname|Sir Mark|Evans}} | {{sortname|Sir Mark|Evans}} | Evans, Sir Mark | [[Sir Mark Evans]] |- | 3 || {{sortname|Sir Mark|Evans|Mark Evans (general)}} | {{sortname|Sir Mark|Evans|Mark Evans (general)}} | Evans, Sir Mark | [[Mark Evans (general)]] |- | 6 || {{sortname|Sir Mark|Evans|Mark Evans (general)|Evans, Mark}} | {{sortname|Sir Mark|Evans|Mark Evans (general)|Evans, Mark}} | Evans, Mark | [[Mark Evans (general)]] |- | |- | 1 || {{sortname|Fábio da|Silva}} | {{sortname|Fábio da|Silva}} | Silva, Fábio da | [[Fábio da Silva]] |- | 2 || {{sortname|Fábio da|Silva|nolink=1}} | {{sortname|Fábio da|Silva|nolink=1}} | Silva, Fábio da | ''(no link)'' |- | 3 || {{sortname|Fábio da|Silva|Fábio Gomes da Silva}} | {{sortname|Fábio da|Silva|Fábio Gomes da Silva}} | Silva, Fábio da | [[Fábio Gomes da Silva]] |- | 4 || {{sortname|Fábio da|Silva||Silva, Fabio}} | {{sortname|Fábio da|Silva||Silva, Fabio}} | Silva, Fabio | [[Fábio da Silva]] |- | 5 || {{sortname|Fábio da|Silva||Silva, Fabio|nolink=1}} | {{sortname|Fábio da|Silva||Silva, has Fabio|nolink=1}} | Silva, Fabio | ''(no link)'' |- | 6 || {{sortname|Fábio da|Silva|Fábio Gomes da Silva|Silva, Fabio}} | {{sortname|Fábio da|Silva|Fábio Gomes da Silva|Silva, Fabio}} | Silva, Fabio | [[Fábio Gomes da Silva]] |} ==Note== To link to a section within the page in which the template appears, encode the [[:en:Number sign|Number sign]]: 
{{Sortname|Examples||#Examples}}
:gives: {{Sortname|Examples||#Examples}} and for an [[Help:Interlanguage links#Inline links|inline Interlanguage link]] the initial colon must be encoded as %3A 
{{Sortname|Hanning|Schröder|%3Ade:Hanning Schröder}}
:gives: {{Sortname|Hanning|Schröder|%3Ade:Hanning Schröder}} ==Microformat== {{UF-hcard-name}} ==See also== *[[Help:Sortable tables#Specifying a sort key for a cell]] *{{tl|sort}} – see talk for central sorting talk *{{tl|Date table sorting}}  – for using dates in sortable tables *{{tl|Number table sorting}}  – for using alphabetic sort mode for numbers in sortable tables *{{tl|Last word}} {{sandbox other|| [[Category:Sorting templates|Sortname]] }} { "params": { "1": { "label": "First Name", "example": "Tom", "required": true, "suggested": true }, "2": { "label": "Last Name", "example": "Jones", "required": true }, "3": { "label": "Optional Link Target", "example": "Tom Jones (singer)", "type": "wiki-page-name" }, "4": { "label": "Optional Sort Key", "example": "Jones, Tom" }, "sort": {}, "last": {}, "first": {}, "nolink": { "label": "No Link", "description": "Type \"1\" for no wikilink to appear ", "example": "1" }, "dab": { "label": "Disambiguator (no brackets)", "example": "singer" }, "link": {} }, "paramOrder": [ "1", "2", "3", "4", "dab", "nolink", "sort", "last", "first", "link" ], "format": "inline" } [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 2 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23606305292|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} {{#ifeq:{{SUBPAGENAME}}|sandbox||{{High-use}}}} {{lua|Module:Sort}} ;Usage:{{sortname|''first''|''last''|''optional link target''|''optional sort key''}} Alternative version of {{tl|sort}} tailored to the wikilinked names of persons, to be used in a sortable table (created with ''class="wikitable sortable"''). *The default sort key is "''last'', ''first''". *The link label is "''first'' ''last''". *The default link target is "''first last''" The optional link target is useful when "''first last''" is a disambiguation page instead of the desired article, or when linking to a section of a page. The optional sort key is useful in the case of special characters such as é. ;Optional parameters : |dab=''disambiguator'' :: Wikilinks to "''first last (disambiguator)''".
(Note: ignored if ''optional link target'' is not blank.) : |nolink=1 ::Suppresses wikilinking the name, useful for list entries which are likely to never have articles so shouldn't be redlinked.
(Note: ''optional link target'' ignored when "|nolink=1" used.) ==Examples== {| class=wikitable ! # || What you type || What's generated |- | 1 || {{sortname|first|last}} | [[first last|first last]] |- | 2 || {{sortname|first|last|nolink=1}} | first last |- | 3 || {{sortname|first|last|dab=disambiguator}} | [[first last (disambiguator)|first last]] |- | 4 || {{sortname|first|last|target}} | [[target|first last]] |- | 5 || {{sortname|first|last||sort}} | [[first last|first last]] |- | 6 || {{sortname|first|last||sort|nolink=1}} | first last |- | 7 || {{sortname|first|last|target|sort}} | [[target|first last]] |} {| class=wikitable ! # || What you type || What's displayed || What's sorted || What's linked |- | 1 || {{sortname|Tom|Jones}} | {{sortname|Tom|Jones}} | Jones, Tom | [[Tom Jones]] |- | 2 || {{sortname|Tom|Jones|nolink=1}} | {{sortname|Tom|Jones|nolink=1}} | Jones, Tom | ''(no link)'' |- | 3 || {{sortname|Tom|Jones|dab=singer}} | {{sortname|Tom|Jones|dab=singer}} | Jones, Tom | [[Tom Jones (singer)]] |- | 4 || {{sortname|Tom|Jones|Tom Jones (singer)}} | {{sortname|Tom|Jones|Tom Jones (singer)}} | Jones, Tom | [[Tom Jones (singer)]] |- | |- | 1 || {{sortname|Fábio|da Silva}} | {{sortname|Fábio|da Silva}} | da Silva, Fábio | [[Fábio da Silva]] |- | 2 || {{sortname|Fábio|da Silva|nolink=1}} | {{sortname|Fábio|da Silva|nolink=1}} | da Silva, Fábio | ''(no link)'' |- | 3 || {{sortname|Fábio|da Silva|Fábio Gomes da Silva}} | {{sortname|Fábio|da Silva|Fábio Gomes da Silva}} | da Silva, Fábio | [[Fábio Gomes da Silva]] |- | 4 || {{sortname|Fábio|da Silva||Silva, Fabio}} | {{sortname|Fábio|da Silva||Silva, Fabio}} | Silva, Fabio | [[Fábio da Silva]] |- | 5 || {{sortname|Fábio|da Silva||Silva, Fabio|nolink=1}} | {{sortname|Fábio|da Silva||Silva, Fabio|nolink=1}} | Silva, Fabio | ''(no link)'' |- | 6 || {{sortname|Fábio|da Silva|Fábio Gomes da Silva|Silva, Fabio}} | {{sortname|Fábio|da Silva|Fábio Gomes da Silva|Silva, Fabio}} | Silva, Fabio | [[Fábio Gomes da Silva]] |} '''Things you might not expect''' {| class=wikitable ! # || What you type || What's displayed || What's sorted || What's linked |- | - || [[Mark Evans]] | [[Mark Evans]] | Mark Evans | [[Mark Evans]] |- | - || [[Mark Evans (general)|Mark Evans]] | [[Mark Evans (general)|Mark Evans]] | Mark Evans (general) | [[Mark Evans (general)]] |- | |- | 1 || Sir {{sortname|Mark|Evans}} | Sir {{sortname|Mark|Evans}} | Sir Evans, Mark | [[Mark Evans]] |- | 1 || {{sortname|Sir Mark|Evans}} | {{sortname|Sir Mark|Evans}} | Evans, Sir Mark | [[Sir Mark Evans]] |- | 3 || {{sortname|Sir Mark|Evans|Mark Evans (general)}} | {{sortname|Sir Mark|Evans|Mark Evans (general)}} | Evans, Sir Mark | [[Mark Evans (general)]] |- | 6 || {{sortname|Sir Mark|Evans|Mark Evans (general)|Evans, Mark}} | {{sortname|Sir Mark|Evans|Mark Evans (general)|Evans, Mark}} | Evans, Mark | [[Mark Evans (general)]] |- | |- | 1 || {{sortname|Fábio da|Silva}} | {{sortname|Fábio da|Silva}} | Silva, Fábio da | [[Fábio da Silva]] |- | 2 || {{sortname|Fábio da|Silva|nolink=1}} | {{sortname|Fábio da|Silva|nolink=1}} | Silva, Fábio da | ''(no link)'' |- | 3 || {{sortname|Fábio da|Silva|Fábio Gomes da Silva}} | {{sortname|Fábio da|Silva|Fábio Gomes da Silva}} | Silva, Fábio da | [[Fábio Gomes da Silva]] |- | 4 || {{sortname|Fábio da|Silva||Silva, Fabio}} | {{sortname|Fábio da|Silva||Silva, Fabio}} | Silva, Fabio | [[Fábio da Silva]] |- | 5 || {{sortname|Fábio da|Silva||Silva, Fabio|nolink=1}} | {{sortname|Fábio da|Silva||Silva, has Fabio|nolink=1}} | Silva, Fabio | ''(no link)'' |- | 6 || {{sortname|Fábio da|Silva|Fábio Gomes da Silva|Silva, Fabio}} | {{sortname|Fábio da|Silva|Fábio Gomes da Silva|Silva, Fabio}} | Silva, Fabio | [[Fábio Gomes da Silva]] |} ==Note== To link to a section within the page in which the template appears, encode the [[:en:Number sign|Number sign]]: 
{{Sortname|Examples||#Examples}}
:gives: {{Sortname|Examples||#Examples}} and for an [[Help:Interlanguage links#Inline links|inline Interlanguage link]] the initial colon must be encoded as %3A 
{{Sortname|Hanning|Schröder|%3Ade:Hanning Schröder}}
:gives: {{Sortname|Hanning|Schröder|%3Ade:Hanning Schröder}} ==Microformat== {{UF-hcard-name}} ==See also== *[[Help:Sortable tables#Specifying a sort key for a cell]] *{{tl|sort}} – see talk for central sorting talk *{{tl|Date table sorting}}  – for using dates in sortable tables *{{tl|Number table sorting}}  – for using alphabetic sort mode for numbers in sortable tables *{{tl|Last word}} {{sandbox other|| }} { "params": { "1": { "label": "First Name", "example": "Tom", "required": true, "suggested": true }, "2": { "label": "Last Name", "example": "Jones", "required": true }, "3": { "label": "Optional Link Target", "example": "Tom Jones (singer)", "type": "wiki-page-name" }, "4": { "label": "Optional Sort Key", "example": "Jones, Tom" }, "sort": {}, "last": {}, "first": {}, "nolink": { "label": "No Link", "description": "Type \"1\" for no wikilink to appear ", "example": "1" }, "dab": { "label": "Disambiguator (no brackets)", "example": "singer" }, "link": {} }, "paramOrder": [ "1", "2", "3", "4", "dab", "nolink", "sort", "last", "first", "link" ], "format": "inline" } [[Category:Sorting templates|Sortname]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24975162458|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} {{#ifeq:{{SUBPAGENAME}}|sandbox||{{High-use}}}} {{lua|Module:Sort}} ;Usage:{{sortname|''first''|''last''|''optional link target''|''optional sort key''}} Alternative version of {{tl|sort}} tailored to the wikilinked names of persons, to be used in a sortable table (created with ''class="wikitable sortable"''). *The default sort key is "''last'', ''first''". *The link label is "''first'' ''last''". *The default link target is "''first last''" The optional link target is useful when "''first last''" is a disambiguation page instead of the desired article, or when linking to a section of a page. The optional sort key is useful in the case of special characters such as é. ;Optional parameters : |dab=''disambiguator'' :: Wikilinks to "''first last (disambiguator)''".
(Note: ignored if ''optional link target'' is not blank.) : |nolink=1 ::Suppresses wikilinking the name, useful for list entries which are likely to never have articles so shouldn't be redlinked.
(Note: ''optional link target'' ignored when "|nolink=1" used.) ==Examples== {| class=wikitable ! # || What you type || What's generated |- | 1 || {{sortname|first|last}} | [[first last|first last]] |- | 2 || {{sortname|first|last|nolink=1}} | first last |- | 3 || {{sortname|first|last|dab=disambiguator}} | [[first last (disambiguator)|first last]] |- | 4 || {{sortname|first|last|target}} | [[target|first last]] |- | 5 || {{sortname|first|last||sort}} | [[first last|first last]] |- | 6 || {{sortname|first|last||sort|nolink=1}} | first last |- | 7 || {{sortname|first|last|target|sort}} | [[target|first last]] |} {| class=wikitable ! # || What you type || What's displayed || What's sorted || What's linked |- | 1 || {{sortname|Tom|Jones}} | {{sortname|Tom|Jones}} | Jones, Tom | [[Tom Jones]] |- | 2 || {{sortname|Tom|Jones|nolink=1}} | {{sortname|Tom|Jones|nolink=1}} | Jones, Tom | ''(no link)'' |- | 3 || {{sortname|Tom|Jones|dab=singer}} | {{sortname|Tom|Jones|dab=singer}} | Jones, Tom | [[Tom Jones (singer)]] |- | 4 || {{sortname|Tom|Jones|Tom Jones (singer)}} | {{sortname|Tom|Jones|Tom Jones (singer)}} | Jones, Tom | [[Tom Jones (singer)]] |- | |- | 1 || {{sortname|Fábio|da Silva}} | {{sortname|Fábio|da Silva}} | da Silva, Fábio | [[Fábio da Silva]] |- | 2 || {{sortname|Fábio|da Silva|nolink=1}} | {{sortname|Fábio|da Silva|nolink=1}} | da Silva, Fábio | ''(no link)'' |- | 3 || {{sortname|Fábio|da Silva|Fábio Gomes da Silva}} | {{sortname|Fábio|da Silva|Fábio Gomes da Silva}} | da Silva, Fábio | [[Fábio Gomes da Silva]] |- | 4 || {{sortname|Fábio|da Silva||Silva, Fabio}} | {{sortname|Fábio|da Silva||Silva, Fabio}} | Silva, Fabio | [[Fábio da Silva]] |- | 5 || {{sortname|Fábio|da Silva||Silva, Fabio|nolink=1}} | {{sortname|Fábio|da Silva||Silva, Fabio|nolink=1}} | Silva, Fabio | ''(no link)'' |- | 6 || {{sortname|Fábio|da Silva|Fábio Gomes da Silva|Silva, Fabio}} | {{sortname|Fábio|da Silva|Fábio Gomes da Silva|Silva, Fabio}} | Silva, Fabio | [[Fábio Gomes da Silva]] |} '''Things you might not expect''' {| class=wikitable ! # || What you type || What's displayed || What's sorted || What's linked |- | - || [[Mark Evans]] | [[Mark Evans]] | Mark Evans | [[Mark Evans]] |- | - || [[Mark Evans (general)|Mark Evans]] | [[Mark Evans (general)|Mark Evans]] | Mark Evans (general) | [[Mark Evans (general)]] |- | |- | 1 || Sir {{sortname|Mark|Evans}} | Sir {{sortname|Mark|Evans}} | Sir Evans, Mark | [[Mark Evans]] |- | 1 || {{sortname|Sir Mark|Evans}} | {{sortname|Sir Mark|Evans}} | Evans, Sir Mark | [[Sir Mark Evans]] |- | 3 || {{sortname|Sir Mark|Evans|Mark Evans (general)}} | {{sortname|Sir Mark|Evans|Mark Evans (general)}} | Evans, Sir Mark | [[Mark Evans (general)]] |- | 6 || {{sortname|Sir Mark|Evans|Mark Evans (general)|Evans, Mark}} | {{sortname|Sir Mark|Evans|Mark Evans (general)|Evans, Mark}} | Evans, Mark | [[Mark Evans (general)]] |- | |- | 1 || {{sortname|Fábio da|Silva}} | {{sortname|Fábio da|Silva}} | Silva, Fábio da | [[Fábio da Silva]] |- | 2 || {{sortname|Fábio da|Silva|nolink=1}} | {{sortname|Fábio da|Silva|nolink=1}} | Silva, Fábio da | ''(no link)'' |- | 3 || {{sortname|Fábio da|Silva|Fábio Gomes da Silva}} | {{sortname|Fábio da|Silva|Fábio Gomes da Silva}} | Silva, Fábio da | [[Fábio Gomes da Silva]] |- | 4 || {{sortname|Fábio da|Silva||Silva, Fabio}} | {{sortname|Fábio da|Silva||Silva, Fabio}} | Silva, Fabio | [[Fábio da Silva]] |- | 5 || {{sortname|Fábio da|Silva||Silva, Fabio|nolink=1}} | {{sortname|Fábio da|Silva||Silva, has Fabio|nolink=1}} | Silva, Fabio | ''(no link)'' |- | 6 || {{sortname|Fábio da|Silva|Fábio Gomes da Silva|Silva, Fabio}} | {{sortname|Fábio da|Silva|Fábio Gomes da Silva|Silva, Fabio}} | Silva, Fabio | [[Fábio Gomes da Silva]] |} ==Note== To link to a section within the page in which the template appears, encode the [[:en:Number sign|Number sign]]: 
{{Sortname|Examples||#Examples}}
:gives: {{Sortname|Examples||#Examples}} and for an [[Help:Interlanguage links#Inline links|inline Interlanguage link]] the initial colon must be encoded as %3A 
{{Sortname|Hanning|Schröder|%3Ade:Hanning Schröder}}
:gives: {{Sortname|Hanning|Schröder|%3Ade:Hanning Schröder}} ==Microformat== {{UF-hcard-name}} ==See also== *[[Help:Sortable tables#Specifying a sort key for a cell]] *{{tl|sort}} – see talk for central sorting talk *{{tl|Date table sorting}}  – for using dates in sortable tables *{{tl|Number table sorting}}  – for using alphabetic sort mode for numbers in sortable tables *{{tl|Last word}} {{sandbox other|| }} { "params": { "1": { "label": "First Name", "example": "Tom", "required": true, "suggested": true }, "2": { "label": "Last Name", "example": "Jones", "required": true }, "3": { "label": "Optional Link Target", "example": "Tom Jones (singer)", "type": "wiki-page-name" }, "4": { "label": "Optional Sort Key", "example": "Jones, Tom" }, "sort": {}, "last": {}, "first": {}, "nolink": { "label": "No Link", "description": "Type \"1\" for no wikilink to appear ", "example": "1" }, "dab": { "label": "Disambiguator (no brackets)", "example": "singer" }, "link": {} }, "paramOrder": [ "1", "2", "3", "4", "dab", "nolink", "sort", "last", "first", "link" ], "format": "inline" } [[Category:Sorting templates|Sortname]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
